name: Gun Fest Blast
description: Do you like gun games! Complete challenging levels and join the fun in this extreme shooter game. Sniper, Deagle, and four different weapons are in the gun fest game. Gun Fest players must increase their weapon count by going through the correct math operations on the parkour with their chosen weapons.
